calls.prompt_summary: Assess infrastructure foundations: compute, databases, networking, region
calls.agent_response_summary: Container Apps for compute (~$8-15/mo), PostgreSQL Flex B1ms + Redis C0 for managed DB, Qdrant+FalkorDB as containerized apps. Central US region. Total ~$51-60/mo.
what_made_into_plan: Azure Container Apps (Consumption) for all containers
PostgreSQL Flexible Server Burstable B1ms
Azure Cache for Redis Basic C0
Qdrant + FalkorDB as Container Apps with Azure Files volumes
Central US region
Azure Container Registry Basic tier
Bot Service F0 free tier
what_was_rejected: AKS (too expensive for POC at ~$73/mo baseline)

calls.prompt_summary: Assess SOC2 readiness, identity, secrets, network security, data security
calls.agent_response_summary: CONDITIONALLY APPROVED. 3 HIGH findings: H-1 secrets in Key Vault, H-2 database connection security, H-3 TLS 1.2+ enforcement. Must resolve before deployment. Medium/Low deferred.
what_made_into_plan: All secrets in Key Vault (H-1)
Managed identity for Key Vault access (H-1)
TLS 1.2+ enforcement on all services (H-3)
Key Vault Secrets User role (not Administrator)
Diagnostic settings to Log Analytics with 12+ month retention
Data classification: Chat=Confidential, Embeddings=Internal
RSC permissions for Teams (no tenant-wide admin consent)
what_was_rejected: WAF deployment (not cost-effective for POC, accepted risk)
DDoS Protection Standard (accepted risk for POC)

calls.prompt_summary: Assess container build, deployment, config management, monitoring
calls.agent_response_summary: Shared base image strategy with ACR. Manual deployment via az CLI. Key Vault secret references for config. Container Apps auto-ships logs to Log Analytics. Teams Adapter needs min replicas=1 to avoid cold start timeout.
what_made_into_plan: Shared clara-base image, service images FROM base
ACR Basic tier for image storage
Manual az CLI deployment (no CI/CD for POC)
Key Vault secret references via managed identity
Min replicas=1 for Teams Adapter and Gateway
Health check validation runbook
Image tagging: latest + YYYYMMDD for rollback
what_was_rejected: CI/CD pipeline (deferred, manual deployment for POC)
